item.action: Require privacy-safe OIDC temporal calibration cohorts to share an explicit measurement contract before drift comparison.
required_evidence: explicit trust limits and falsification route

progress.finding: Cohort drift is interpretable only when both aggregates declare matching schema, metric definitions, collector version, provider class, clock basis, collection method, quantile method, and privacy profile. Field-shape similarity alone is insufficient.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed against byte-identical pre-commit files.
progress.uncertainty: The gate validates declared compatibility, not the truth of declarations, sample independence, clock accuracy, or provider guarantees.

item.handoff: Cloudflare Research should place this gate immediately before R-010. Only disposition drift_evaluation_permitted may proceed to drift detection; no result authorizes verifier-policy change, token acceptance, or deployment.

reason: Shared queue state is maintained through additive projections to avoid overwriting concurrent team work.
